name: Italian Burgers
recipeIngredient: 1 package frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beef, spinach, garlic, Parmesan, sauce and crumbs in bowl.
Divide mixture into 8 equal patties.
2. Broil or grill 4 inches from heat for 6 minutes on each side or until cooked through. Top with 2 tablespoons shredded mozzarella. Broil until cheese melts. Serve on buns.
